queries.name: About: Iceberg catalog explorer (BI)
queries.description: Generated by examples/build-iceberg-dashboards.mjs — edit that script, not this entry.

cfg.content:
## Iceberg catalog explorer — BI

Dataset shape and growth of every Iceberg catalog installed as an
`ice_meta_<catalog>` database, read through the `ice_meta_all` union layer
(one `catalog` filter drives every tile; blank = all catalogs).

All numbers come from Iceberg *metadata* (metadata.json / manifest lists) —
no table data is scanned. Install/extend catalogs with
`iceberg-install.json`; per-table drill-down (data files, partition skew,
Parquet footers) comes from its "Generate: per-catalog drill-down Library"
entry.

queries.name: Rows per table (current)
queries.sql:
SELECT concat(catalog, '.', ice_table) AS table, argMax(total_records, sequence_number) AS rows
FROM ice_meta_all.snapshots
WHERE 1 /*[ AND catalog = {catalog:String} ]*/
GROUP BY catalog, ice_table
ORDER BY rows DESC
LIMIT 25
queries.description: Current row count per Iceberg table from the latest snapshot — metadata only, no data scan.

queries.name: Storage per table, GiB (current)
queries.sql:
SELECT concat(catalog, '.', ice_table) AS table, round(argMax(total_files_size, sequence_number) / 1073741824, 2) AS gib
FROM ice_meta_all.snapshots
WHERE 1 /*[ AND catalog = {catalog:String} ]*/
GROUP BY catalog, ice_table
ORDER BY gib DESC
LIMIT 25
queries.description: Current data-file footprint per table from the latest snapshot totals.

queries.name: Data files per table (current)
queries.sql:
SELECT concat(catalog, '.', ice_table) AS table, argMax(total_data_files, sequence_number) AS files
FROM ice_meta_all.snapshots
WHERE 1 /*[ AND catalog = {catalog:String} ]*/
GROUP BY catalog, ice_table
ORDER BY files DESC
LIMIT 25
queries.description: Current data-file count per table. Thousands of files on a small table = compaction candidate (see the DBA dashboard / drill-down).

queries.name: Average data-file size, MiB
queries.sql:
SELECT concat(catalog, '.', ice_table) AS table,
       round(argMax(total_files_size, sequence_number) / greatest(argMax(total_data_files, sequence_number), 1) / 1048576, 2) AS avg_mib
FROM ice_meta_all.snapshots
WHERE 1 /*[ AND catalog = {catalog:String} ]*/
GROUP BY catalog, ice_table
ORDER BY avg_mib ASC
LIMIT 25
queries.description: Current avg file size per table (total size / total files). Healthy Iceberg tables sit in the tens-to-hundreds of MiB; consistently tiny files mean the writer needs batching or the table needs compaction.

queries.name: Row growth by snapshot
queries.sql:
SELECT committed_at, concat(catalog, '.', ice_table) AS table, total_records AS rows
FROM ice_meta_all.snapshots
WHERE 1 /*[ AND catalog = {catalog:String} ]*/
ORDER BY committed_at
queries.description: total_records over each table's snapshot history — the growth curve of every table, one line per table.

queries.name: Commits per day
queries.sql:
SELECT toDate(committed_at) AS day, concat(catalog, '.', ice_table) AS table, count() AS commits
FROM ice_meta_all.snapshots
WHERE 1 /*[ AND catalog = {catalog:String} ]*/
GROUP BY day, table
ORDER BY day
queries.description: Snapshot commits per day per table — write cadence. A table committing hundreds of times a day is a streaming writer producing small snapshots.

queries.name: Warehouse objects by kind
queries.sql:
SELECT kind, count() AS objects
FROM ice_meta_all.objects
WHERE 1 /*[ AND catalog = {catalog:String} ]*/
GROUP BY kind
ORDER BY objects DESC
queries.description: Full object census of every catalog warehouse bucket, classified by Iceberg role. A large "other" slice means non-Iceberg junk in the bucket.

queries.name: Warehouse bytes by kind
queries.sql:
SELECT kind, round(sum(size_bytes) / 1048576, 1) AS mib
FROM ice_meta_all.objects
WHERE 1 /*[ AND catalog = {catalog:String} ]*/
GROUP BY kind
ORDER BY mib DESC
queries.description: Same census weighted by bytes — how much of the bucket is data vs. metadata overhead.

queries.name: Schema width per table
queries.sql:
SELECT concat(catalog, '.', ice_table) AS table, count() AS columns
FROM ice_meta_all.schema_columns
WHERE 1 /*[ AND catalog = {catalog:String} ]*/
GROUP BY catalog, ice_table
ORDER BY columns DESC
queries.description: Column count of each table's current schema.
